Bash(cd "/home/lucial/Git Projects/linuxphotoshop" && python3 -c "
from PyQt6.QtGui import QImage, QColor
from core.adjustments.hdr_toning import apply_hdr_toning, HDRToningDialog

img = QImage\(40, 30, QImage.Format.Format_ARGB32_Premultiplied\)
img.fill\(QColor\(120, 80, 200\)\)

out = apply_hdr_toning\(img, radius=5, strength=0.6, gamma=1.2, detail=0.3\)
print\('apply OK, format:', out.format\(\)\)

# Check caching: simulate dialog usage
import numpy as np
from ui.adjustments_dialog import _bits_ba, _to_argb32
src = _to_argb32\(img\)
ba, arr = _bits_ba\(src\)
orig_f = arr[:,:,:3].astype\(np.float32\)/255.0

from core.adjustments.hdr_toning import _gauss_blur, _hdr_combine
blurred = _gauss_blur\(orig_f, 5\)
print\('blur shape:', blurred.shape, 'dtype:', blurred.dtype\)
res = _hdr_combine\(np, orig_f, blurred, 0.5, 1.0, 0.2\)
print\('combine shape:', res.shape, 'dtype:', res.dtype\)
print\('All OK'\)
")

from PyQt6.QtWidgets import QApplication
from PyQt6.QtGui import QImage, QColor
import sys
app = QApplication\(sys.argv\)

# Test the blur on a real image
img = QImage\(200, 200, QImage.Format.Format_ARGB32_Premultiplied\)
img.fill\(QColor\(128, 64, 32\)\)

from core.filters.blur_filters import apply_gaussian_blur
for r in \(0.1, 1.0, 10.0, 50.0, 250.0\):
    out = apply_gaussian_blur\(img, r\)
    assert out.width\(\) == 200 and out.height\(\) == 200, f'bad size at r={r}'
    print\(f'  radius={r:5.1f} -> OK'\)

print\('All OK'\)
app.quit\(\)
" 2>&1)

from PyQt6.QtWidgets import QApplication
from PyQt6.QtGui import QImage, QColor
import sys
app = QApplication\(sys.argv\)

img = QImage\(200, 150, QImage.Format.Format_ARGB32_Premultiplied\)
img.fill\(QColor\(180, 90, 40\)\)

from core.filters.blur_filters import apply_average, apply_blur, apply_blur_more, apply_box_blur
for fn, args in [
    \(apply_average,  \(img,\)\),
    \(apply_blur,     \(img,\)\),
    \(apply_blur_more,\(img,\)\),
    \(apply_box_blur, \(img, 1\)\),
    \(apply_box_blur, \(img, 50\)\),
    \(apply_box_blur, \(img, 100\)\),
]:
    out = fn\(*args\)
    assert out.width\(\) == 200 and out.height\(\) == 150
    print\(f'{fn.__name__} {args[1:]} -> OK'\)
app.quit\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/home/lucial/Git Projects/linuxphotoshop" && python3 -c "
import time
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import QApplication
from PyQt6.QtGui import QImage, QColor
import sys
app = QApplication\(sys.argv\)

img = QImage\(800, 600, QImage.Format.Format_ARGB32_Premultiplied\)
img.fill\(QColor\(100, 150, 200\)\)

from core.filters.blur_filters import apply_smart_blur
from core.filters.motion_blur import apply_motion_blur
from core.filters.radial_blur import apply_radial_blur

tests = [
    \('Smart Blur r=50  t=30',  lambda: apply_smart_blur\(img, 50, 30\)\),
    \('Smart Blur r=100 t=15',  lambda: apply_smart_blur\(img, 100, 15\)\),
    \('Motion Blur s=500',      lambda: apply_motion_blur\(img, 45, 500\)\),
    \('Motion Blur s=999',      lambda: apply_motion_blur\(img, 30, 999\)\),
    \('Radial Spin a=100',      lambda: apply_radial_blur\(img, 'Spin', 100\)\),
    \('Radial Zoom a=100',      lambda: apply_radial_blur\(img, 'Zoom', 100\)\),
]
for name, fn in tests:
    t0 = time.perf_counter\(\)
    out = fn\(\)
    dt = time.perf_counter\(\) - t0
    assert out.width\(\) == 800 and out.height\(\) == 600
    print\(f'  {name:26s} {dt*1000:5.0f} ms'\)
app.quit\(\)
" 2>&1)

import time
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import QApplication
from PyQt6.QtGui import QImage, QColor
import sys
app = QApplication\(sys.argv\)

img = QImage\(800, 600, QImage.Format.Format_ARGB32_Premultiplied\)
img.fill\(QColor\(100, 150, 200\)\)

from core.filters.blur_filters import apply_surface_blur
for r, t in [\(5,15\),\(50,30\),\(100,50\)]:
    t0 = time.perf_counter\(\)
    out = apply_surface_blur\(img, r, t\)
    dt = time.perf_counter\(\) - t0
    assert out.width\(\)==800 and out.height\(\)==600
    print\(f'  r={r:3d} t={t:3d}  →  {dt*1000:.0f} ms  OK'\)
app.quit\(\)

import time
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import QApplication
from PyQt6.QtGui import QImage, QColor
import sys
app = QApplication\(sys.argv\)
img = QImage\(800, 600, QImage.Format.Format_ARGB32_Premultiplied\)
img.fill\(QColor\(100, 150, 200\)\)
from core.filters.blur_filters import apply_shape_blur
for shape in \('Circle','Square','Triangle','Diamond'\):
    for r in \(5, 50, 100\):
        t0 = time.perf_counter\(\)
        out = apply_shape_blur\(img, r, shape\)
        dt = time.perf_counter\(\) - t0
        assert out.width\(\)==800 and out.height\(\)==600
        print\(f'  {shape:8s} r={r:3d}  {dt*1000:5.0f} ms  OK'\)
app.quit\(\)
" 2>&1)

import time
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import QApplication
from PyQt6.QtGui import QImage, QColor
import sys
app = QApplication\(sys.argv\)
img = QImage\(800, 600, QImage.Format.Format_ARGB32_Premultiplied\)
img.fill\(QColor\(120, 80, 200\)\)
from core.filters.blur_filters import apply_lens_blur
for r, c in [\(10,0\),\(10,50\),\(10,100\),\(50,0\),\(50,100\),\(100,50\)]:
    t0 = time.perf_counter\(\)
    out = apply_lens_blur\(img, r, c\)
    dt = time.perf_counter\(\) - t0
    assert out.width\(\)==800 and out.height\(\)==600
    print\(f'  r={r:3d} curvature={c:3d}  {dt*1000:5.0f} ms  OK'\)
app.quit\(\)

Bash(cd "/home/lucial/Git Projects/linuxphotoshop" && python -c "
import json
with open\('locales/en.json'\) as f:
    d = json.load\(f\)
adj_keys = [k for k in d if k.startswith\('adj.'\)]
print\(f'Added {len\(adj_keys\)} adj.* keys to en.json'\)

with open\('locales/ru.json'\) as f:
    d2 = json.load\(f\)
adj_keys2 = [k for k in d2 if k.startswith\('adj.'\)]
missing = set\(adj_keys\) - set\(adj_keys2\)
print\(f'adj.* keys in ru.json: {len\(adj_keys2\)}'\)
if missing:
    print\(f'Missing in ru.json: {missing}'\)
else:
    print\('All adj.* keys present in both files'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/home/lucial/Git Projects/linuxphotoshop" && python -c "
import ui.adjustments_dialog
import ui.levels_dialog
print\('Imports OK'\)

import json
with open\('locales/en.json'\) as f:
    en = json.load\(f\)
with open\('locales/ru.json'\) as f:
    ru = json.load\(f\)

en_keys = set\(en\)
ru_keys = set\(ru\)
missing_ru = en_keys - ru_keys
missing_en = ru_keys - en_keys
if missing_ru:
    print\('Missing in ru.json:', missing_ru\)
elif missing_en:
    print\('Missing in en.json:', missing_en\)
else:
    print\(f'Both JSON files in sync — {len\(en_keys\)} total keys'\)
" 2>&1)
